GitHubs Bons

GitHub - hellomasaya/air-pollution-in-delhi: Analysis and prediction of air pollutant concentration and AQI using Prophet and SARIMAX
GitHub - zeeshanmulla/AirQuality-Index-Project: A Project on prediction of Air Quality index from Data Collection, Data Pre-processing and applying Machine Learning Algorithms- Linear, Ridge and Lasso, Decision Tree, Random Forest, KNN, XGBoost...... AND applied TPOT just to see it work. *_*
GitHub - adaj/sensingbee: Project on spatial interpolation of sensors data with machine learning

GitHub - BaltimoreOpenAir/222.github.io: GitHub page for Baltimore Open Air

Excelent
GitHub - dhruvam-zaveri/Predicting-Air-Pollution-Levels: A machine learning model, which when given the features extracted available in the dataset can predict air quality index using multi-feature linear regression.
GitHub - PoojyaSree/AIR-QUALITY-PREDICTION: Air Quality prediction using ML with django
GitHub - patricksferraz/aqw-madrid-data-analysis
GitHub - ChiragJawale9/Data-Analysis-and-Visualization-of-India-Air-Quality: The purpose of this project is to analyze and visualize the data of Air Quality in India.
GitHub - zhuofan-16/Air_Quality_Forecasting: Air Quality Time Series Forecasting using Statsmodel
GitHub - andypeng93/Capstone_Project: Time Series Analysis on air pollution in Gucheng, China.
GitHub - khushimaheshwari/Air_Quality_Prediction_Model
GitHub - pavobravo11/Data4Good_Climate_Analysis: A micro-project done by a number of volunteers from the Data4Good organization for the purpose of raising awareness of the climate situation in Calgary.
GitHub - guchenghao/Air-Quality-Prediction: Prediction for Air Quality in Beijing
GitHub - briandi26/Deep-Learning-for-Air-Quality-Prediction: Time Series Forecasting to predict air quality in Bandung using Deep Learning with Long Short Term Memory (LSTM) Neural Network
GitHub - haojing9058/Time-Series-Air-Quality
GitHub - temp3rr0r/Ozone-Narx-DNN: Air-quality forecasting in Belgium using Deep Neural Networks, Neuroevolution and distributed Island T​ranspeciation
GitHub - vishnukanduri/Air-quality-index-prediction-using-LSTM: I predict air quality index of a city in China using a Long Short Term Memory (LSTM) neural network. for a year. Executed time series analysis
GitHub - Alro10/deep-learning-time-series: List of papers, code and experiments using deep learning for time series forecasting
GitHub - ourownstory/neural_prophet: NeuralProphet: A simple forecasting package
GitHub - geoinsights/ChinaAQIData: 中国城市AQI数据(AQI Data of Cities in China)

GitHub - davidcarslaw/openair: Tools for air quality data analysis
GitHub - sksujan58/Multivariate-time-series-forecasting-using-LSTM
GitHub - dafrie/lstm-load-forecasting: Electricity load forecasting with LSTM (Recurrent Neural Network)
GitHub - nachi-hebbar/Time-Series-Forecasting-LSTM: Time series forecasting using LSTM in Python
